Dermatologists & Dermato-surgeons

Oral & Maxillofacial Surgeons
Oculoplastic Surgeons

Day 0 · Hands-On Workshops · Fri 25 Sept · AIIMS New Delhi

Operate where India's best are trained.

Day 0 puts you inside AIIMS New Delhi — the country's most prestigious medical institution — for cadaveric dissection, live demonstrations, and hands-on labs beside its faculty. For most surgeons, access like this is a career milestone. Every workshop includes free Main Conference access. Seats are extremely limited.

The Faculty · The Reason You Come

Learn from the names that define the field.

Operate, dissect, and think alongside the surgeons shaping facial aesthetics — many of them from AIIMS New Delhi. Hover any name to meet them.

The Full Faculty

50+ voices. One stage.

…and a distinguished panel of national & international experts across every facial aesthetic subspecialty.

Academic Competitions & Scientific Activities

Where research meets recognition.

Interactive Quiz

FaceVerse F.A.Q.

The Facial Aesthetic Quotient — a live, high-energy quiz testing clinical judgment in real-world aesthetic practice. Prelims & finals across both conference days.

Open to residents & delegates
Free Papers

Clinical Paper Forum

Present original research, clinical studies, and evidence-driven insights to 500+ surgeons, dermatologists, and academics from across India and the world.

Submit by 1 Aug 2026
Poster Gallery

Clinical Poster Gallery

A curated visual showcase of case studies, techniques, and real-world outcomes — with dedicated poster presentation sessions and peer discussion.

Visual case studies welcome
Call for AbstractsPaper & Poster Presentations

Open to registered delegates — present your work to 500+ surgeons, dermatologists & academics. Submit under any category:

Facial Aesthetic SurgeryRhinoplasty & SeptorhinoplastyOculoplastic & PeriorbitalNon-Surgical RejuvenationFacial ReconstructionRegenerative & Energy-BasedInnovation & TechniqueComplications & RevisionResearch
Max 300 words · structured headings · case reports welcome
Up to 4 abstracts per presenting author
Oral or Poster — committee confirms format
Times New Roman 12pt · 1.5 spacing · Word (.docx)
Blind peer review on merit, originality & rigor
Ethics approval, patient consent & COI disclosure required

Key Dates

2 March 2026
Submissions Open
1 August 2026
Submission Deadline
15 August 2026
Acceptance Notified

Awards for Best Paper & Best Poster. Accepted abstracts may feature in the conference souvenir & official digital platform.

Conference registration is mandatory before submission. Residents may register for the F.A.Q., Paper Forum & Poster Gallery. File name: FaceVerse_Abstract_FirstAuthorName.docx. Late submissions will not be considered.

Submit Abstract / Register →

Main Conference (2 days)₹10,000100 SeatsFilling Fast

Only 100 total seats. All seats are limited and allocated on a first-come, first-served basis. Cadaver workshops and Hair Transplant are now sold out — waitlist only. Pre-surge pricing has closed; current rates apply. Seat confirmed only upon receipt of payment. Seats are non-transferable. A recognised postgraduate degree is essential for participation.

Register at the Form →
About the Conference

India's most anticipated facial aesthetics meet.

A premier three-day event uniting world-renowned surgeons, leading specialists, and emerging voices from across the globe.

From groundbreaking surgical techniques to live demonstrations and interactive sessions, FaceVerse India 2026 delivers deep, practical learning for every stage of your career.

More than a lecture series, this is a space for hands-on training, peer-to-peer exchange, and direct mentorship with some of the most respected names in the field.

Every pre-conference workshop registration includes complimentary access to the Main Conference.

Why Attend?

  • Gain insights directly from global leaders sharing cutting-edge techniques and research
  • Explore the latest in regenerative aesthetics, AI-driven planning, HIFU, lasers & more
  • Refine surgical techniques through interactive workshops with experienced faculty
  • Build a network spanning surgeons, dermatologists, trainees, and industry innovators
  • Receive FaceVerse Certification acknowledging your participation and level
